'''Geld Bernar''' was a [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Geld Bernar was a [[Khil]] trader.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Bernar bought the ''[[Merasy]]'', a [[Nova-Drive]] [[3-Z light freighter]] that had been impounded by the authorities of [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] and was being auctioned. The previous owner, [[Iep Tumu]], had made a poor job with its maintenance, but the Brentaalan mechanics had overhauled most of its problems except for an acceleration vibration.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

For several years, Bernar used the ''Merasy'' in long raiding runs, obtaining a good profit and new, valuable contacts in each of them. Bernar then modified the ship upon his needs: He increased the consumables capacities and bought advanced entertainment. He also bought the best available astrogation charts (including secret, cooperative and military charts) that allowed him to save several days per trip. Obsessed with logging his trips, he made backup charts.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

He almost managed to get rid of Tumuy's vibration.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

After several years of profit, Bernar sold the ship to invest in a high-speed shipping venture. He neglected to delete the backup astrogation charts before losing the ''Merasy''.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
